statement.sentence: At Zavari Haus, we create refined stays that feel calm, comfortable, and memorable.

featuredSpaces.description: Discover our handpicked apartments, designed for comfort, style, and effortless living

pillars.title: What Makes Us Different
pillars.description: Every Zavari Haus stay is built around four essentials: privacy, comfort, service, and a memorable guest experience.

items.subtitle: A peaceful stay with personal space
items.description: Enjoy a calm and private environment where you can relax without disturbance. Our spaces are selected and prepared to give guests comfort, security, and peace of mind
details: Quiet interiors for a peaceful stay

items.subtitle: Everything prepared for easy living
items.description: From clean bedding to well-designed interiors, every detail is arranged to make your stay smooth, relaxing, and comfortable from the moment you arrive

items.subtitle: Helpful support whenever you need it
items.description: Our team is here to make your stay simple and stress-free. From booking to check-out, we focus on quick communication, smooth handling, and reliable guest support

items.subtitle: A stay that feels better than ordinary
items.description: Zavari Haus is designed for guests who want more than just a place to sleep. We create a polished, comfortable, and memorable stay experience
details: Convenient locations near key city spots
Ideal for families, business guests, and short stays
